YESCDS 0.99.8
  • Reference
    • A0 Introductory Notebook
    • A1 Cancers in my world
    • A2 Cancer rates for public health assessment
    • A3 Monitoring of cancer by public health institutions
    • A4 Using interactive tables
    • A5 Data graphics
    • A6 Age standardization of cancer rates
    • B1 Cancer across the globe
    • B2 Enhancing tables with geography
    • B3 Cancer in our counties
    • C1 Cancer in our bodies: Overall view
    • C2 Variation in survival with cancer
    • C3 Molecular origins of diverse cancers
    • D1 Clinical trials concepts
    • D2 Equipoise: when medical knowledge can only advance by experimenting
    • D3 Randomization to reduce bias
    • D4 Methods of comparing treatments
    • E1 Inclusive genomic data science education, illustrated with cancer genomics
    • E2: Language analysis and production with R and some LLMs

Package index

All functions

MA_cancer_rate_table()
simple tables of confidence intervals for cancer incidence
SEER_2018
a data.frame with SEER estimates of cancer incidence for 2018
brcamutSE
a SummarizedExperiment collecting BRCA mutations and colData from curatedTCGAData
build_deck()
make a deck of cards with 52 elements and unicode symbols for suits
build_simple_survival_curve()
utility for survival curve illustration
build_surv_for_mut()
use curatedTCGAData to produce survival time structure and mutation matrix for a TCGA tumor type
canada_crude
a data.frame with (rounded) crude rates of cancer as presented at https://www.statcan.gc.ca/en/dai/btd/asr
cancer_map_app()
use shiny for a simple cancer map, by type, for US
cancer_map_usa()
simple function for site-specific map
cancer_map_world()
simple map of cancer rates world wide
compare_tumors()
compare multiple tumor times with respect to survival
do_new_surv()
utility for survival curve, alternate shape
faces()
get faces of a collection of cards
filter_woncan()
generate site-specific rate table
full_house()
test for full house
get_hcc_spatial_path()
retrieve or cache SingleCellExperiment data for spatial transcriptomics of HCC
is_flush()
test for flush
make_comparison()
make an interactive histogram of rate ratios, or a scatterplot for rate comparisons, between two areas
make_hist()
make an interactive histogram for a given cancer site, based on a rate table
make_pair()
make interactive beeswarm or box plots for all cancer incidence rates in two areas
map_app()
use shiny to explore aspects of geographic mapping
mass_cancer_map()
map cancer rates for selected sites to MA counties
mass_map()
simple function to display HTML map of MA
metabric
a data.frame with clinical features of a breast cancer study (METABRIC) derived from cBioPortal
one_pair()
test for one pair
ordered_seg_cal()
big display of ordered CIs for California Lung and Bronchus incidence 2014-2018
plot_seer_trend()
plot the rate statistics over time for selected cancer sites and subgroups
plotwci()
simple display of confidence intervals for cancer incidence
prostate_met_adeno
a data.frame with clinical features of a metastatic prostate adenocarcinoma study
show_5y_estimate()
utility for survival curve illustration: 5y survprob estimate sketch
show_median_estimate()
utility for survival curve illustration: median estimate sketch
statcrunch_msa
geographic information from statcrunch.com on metropolitan statistical areas
suits()
get suits of a collection of cards
table_woncan()
simplify table view of WONDER CDC statistsics
two_pairs()
test for two pairs
url_1R()
give URL for responder example
url_6NR()
give URL for non-responder example
us_county_geo
locations of US counties
us_map()
simple function to display HTML map of US
variation_app()
simple app to show different ways of examining variation over body sites and MSAs
vjc_cancer_net
a table of data of Vince's contacts who developed cancer
woncan
cancer rate data by metropolitan statistical area, 1999-2018, from CDC WONDER system
woncan_meta
metadata on cancer rate data by metropolitan statistical area, 1999-2018, from CDC WONDER system
woncan_types()
generate vector of cancer sites in CDC Wonder table
world_cancer_2020_all
a table of cancer rate data by country, retrieved from https://gco.iarc.fr/today/online-analysis-map
world_geo_sf
a simple features (sf) instance with boundaries and centroids for 241 countries or other political geographic entities

Developed by Vince Carey.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
